name: Zenith Energy Ltd.
summary: Zenith Energy Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, explores for and develops oil and natural gas in Italy, the Republic of the Congo, and internationally. It also produces and sells electricity and condensate. The company was formerly known as Canoel International Energy Ltd. and changed its name to Zenith Energy Ltd. in October 2014. Zenith Energy Ltd. was incorporated in 2007 and is based in Calgary, Canada.
